overall.description: A game engine sequence showing a large monolithic sea stack in coastal waters. The camera begins at water level circling the rock formation, ascends the cliff face, then transitions to an aerial drone view revealing the surrounding forested coastline and beaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters with isolated sea stack

agents.ego_description: navigating around the base of a large monolithic rock formation in shallow coastal waters

entered.detail: tall monolithic rock formation rising from the ocean with layered sedimentary texture
calm reflective water surface with gentle ripples
white cumulus clouds scattered across blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tranquil ocean scene dominated by a massive sea stack rising from the water. The camera moves slowly around the formation at water level, revealing the rock's scale and the calm surrounding waters under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with forested backdrop

events.description: camera passes the main rock revealing the rocky shoreline and forested coast beyond
second smaller sea stack becomes visible in the far distance

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate around the rock base, revealing the coastline and distant landscape

entered.detail: rocky beach and tide pools at the base of the sea stack
dense green forest covering the coastal hills and mountains
smaller rock formation visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: Moving past the main rock formation, the scene opens up to reveal a rocky shoreline and lush forested mountains in the background. A second smaller sea stack appears on the distant horizon as the camera continues its water-level exploration.

events.description: camera begins ascending vertically up the cliff face of the sea stack

agents.ego_description: climbing up the sheer rock face of the sea stack, revealing detailed geological layers

entered.detail: detailed sedimentary rock layers and erosion patterns on the cliff surface

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the sheer cliff face of the sea stack, showcasing detailed geological strata and erosion patterns. The forested coastline remains visible to the left while the rocky shoreline falls away below.

events.description: camera reaches the summit and transitions to high aerial drone perspective

agents.ego_description: hovering above the sea stack at altitude, surveying the expansive coastline and ocean

entered.detail: long stretch of sandy shoreline along the forested coast
vast open water extending to the horizon with gentle wave patterns

segments.scene_description: From the summit, the perspective shifts to a high aerial view revealing the full scale of the sea stack and the expansive coastline. The camera pulls back to show the relationship between the isolated rock, the sandy beaches, and the forested mountains lining the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested coastal mountains with sandy beach

agents.ego_description: flying along the coastline at moderate altitude, showcasing the forested hills and shoreline

entered.detail: dense coniferous forest covering rolling coastal mountains
steep forested cliffs dropping down to the beach

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the coastline from an aerial perspective, highlighting the dense forested mountains, rocky cliffs, and sandy beaches. The sea stack recedes into the distance as the camera continues along the rugged natural shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at water level around a massive sea stack and ascends into a sweeping aerial survey of a rugged coastline. It begins by circling the base of the monolithic rock formation in tranquil waters under a partly cloudy sky, before gliding past to reveal a rocky shoreline and distant forested mountains. The camera then climbs the sheer cliff face, tracing detailed geological strata as the shoreline falls away below. Upon reaching the summit, the perspective shifts into a high aerial view that pulls back to reveal the relationship between the isolated stack, sandy beaches, and the expansive coast. Finally, the camera follows the shoreline from above, gliding past dense forests and rocky cliffs as the sea stack recedes into the distance.
